aside.jobTitle: Josefine Eriksson, Fullstack Developer & Graphic/Web Designer

aboutMe.title: About me
aboutMe.p1: Hi! My name is Josefine and I live in Mjölby with my two teenage daughters.
aboutMe.p2: My journey into digital creation actually began back in 2007. What started as curiosity about designing blogs, building my own web shop, and selling my own products on Fyndiq has evolved over the years into a deep interest in web development. With a solid foundation in graphic design, HTML, CSS, and image editing, I took the step to broaden my skills into modern fullstack development. Today, I primarily code in React, Next.js, and Node.js.
aboutMe.p3: I like to describe myself as a fullstack developer with roots in frontend. I love building the logic behind the scenes, but my eye for detail and visual identities means I put extra heart into creating accessible and responsive interfaces. After recently completing a six-month and educational internship (LIA), I am currently focusing on building my own web application tailored for small businesses in the construction industry. It is a project where I independently get to plan, structure, and build the entire system from scratch.
aboutMe.p4: As a person, I am driven and have a strong desire to constantly learn new things. I am motivated by driving projects forward and turning ideas into finished code. I am now looking for a permanent workplace where I can continue to grow, contribute to the team, and build smart solutions.
aboutMe.p5: When the screens go off, you'll usually find me out in nature to recharge, at the piano, or relaxing with some computer games and crafts.
